description_long: This is a large, cube-shaped snacks package with a vibrant, eye-catching design. The box is predominantly covered in a gradient of orange and yellow dots, with bold black text reading 'CRAZY EIGHTS' on multiple sides. A playful, winking smiley face with its tongue out is prominently featured, adding a fun and whimsical touch. The front and top panels display the King Bird Fireclass Fireworks logo, as well as several icons and text blocks describing effects, shot count, and other features. The packaging is made of sturdy cardboard, with glossy printed graphics and a sealed top. The overall appearance is festive and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban setting.
description: A colorful, cube-shaped snacks box with bold 'CRAZY EIGHTS' text, a playful smiley face, and vibrant orange-yellow dot graphics.
description_view_0: This view shows the top and one side of the box, highlighting the 'CRAZY EIGHTS' text, smiley face, King Bird logo, and detailed product information panels.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the side panel with large 'CRAZY EIGHTS' text and the smiley face, with less detailed information visible compared to other views.
description_view_2: This view is similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, again showing the top and a different side panel with the same main graphics and logos.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the opposite side panel with the same large text and smiley face, but no detailed product information.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular King Bird Fireclass Fireworks logo is visible on the top and side panels, featuring a red and yellow bird head with black text on a yellow background.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A large, playful winking smiley face with its tongue out is present on the top and side panels as a promotional graphic.
